title: GCS storage for Onyxia
summary: Shared GCS data bucket exposed through Onyxia S3 compatibility and the STS bridge.

security.auth: Keycloak OIDC to STS bridge to per-user GCS HMAC credentials
security.notes: Access isolation is expected through user/project prefixes and per-user service accounts; UAT must prove cross-prefix denial.

runtimeHooks.target: Onyxia file explorer and launched IDEs

blockers: Authenticated UI and IDE tests require a real Onyxia login session.

notes: Live config points S3 to https://storage.googleapis.com with pathStyleAccess=true and bucket sent-tech-onyxia-data.
